name: Hero Banner Test
prompt: Design two hero banner variants: one bold with a strong CTA gradient, and one minimal with a dark, understated design. Compare click-through and bounce rates.
context: Testing two hero banner designs for conversion rate on the homepage.

variant-a.description: Bold CTA with purple gradient background
highlights: Large CTA button with high contrast
notes: Uses white button on purple gradient for strong contrast
Uses transparent button with blue border for understated feel
